features: 6 x Axe “Apollo” men’s deodorant / body spray - 0% aluminium - 150 ml.
Axe Apollo deodorant keeps you fresh all day long.
Combines the scent of green fruit, sandalwood and sage.
description: Product description Axe Apollo deodorant / body spray for men - 0% aluminium - 150 ml Axe Apollo deodorant keeps you fresh all day long. Free from aluminium salts. AXE Apollo has a classic, masculine, refined fragrance with an addictive edge. Combines the scent of green fruit, sandalwood and sage. Directions Clean and dry the underarm area before use. Apply a thin, even layer of deodorant to the underarm area. Allow the deodorant to dry completely before putting on the clothes. Reapply as needed during the day or after physical activity to ensure continuous protection.
